# /status

> Utility. Prints feature status: phase, current states, gates, dependencies, doc presence, recent history.

## Usage

```
/status [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>] [--all]
```

`--all` iterates every feature under `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/`.

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/.workflow.json`
- `projects/{p}/_handoffs/*.handoff.json`

## Output sections

- Phase + current states
- Gates (each with APPROVED/PENDING + timestamp)
- Cross-agent dependencies (READY / BLOCKED / WAITING)
- Doc presence (`fdd.md` / `tdd.md` / `blueprint.md` / `test-plan/`)
- Recent history (last 5 commands)
